title: Limit on Status values for a specific status column
excerpt: Hi - Is there a limit to the number of status values that can exist for a specific status column?

posts.author: kitmackie (Kit Mackie)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi - Is there a limit to the number of status values that can exist for a specific status column?

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @kitmackie – yes, there are 30 colors to choose from. If you want a column that will let you select from more options, try the Dropdown column.

Hope that helps!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
